zh_cn: 向前重击并短暂击退敌人

en_us: Fire at the nearest enemy for steady damage

en_us: Howl to boost nearby pack attack speed

en_us: Slam the ground for damage and a short stun

en_us: Trade health for lifesteal and rage

en_us: Open a rift to summon allies and burst damage

Breathe a cone of flame forward

zh_cn: 召下陨火造成大范围伤害
en_us: Call meteor fire over a large area

召唤链式风暴打击多个敌人

zh_cn: 齿轮拳击造成近战伤害
发射炮弹造成远程范围伤害

zh_cn: 展开修复场治疗并提供护盾
en_us: Create a repair field with healing and shields

en_us: Place a mire totem that poisons enemies and heals allies

zh_cn: 推出泥浪伤害并减速敌人

en_us: Shield allies and slow nearby enemies

zh_cn: 连续挥砍造成高频近战伤害

Throw a powder keg that explodes after a delay

zh_cn: 呼叫炮击并提升友军开火节奏
en_us: Call a barrage and quicken allied fire
Charge forward and knock enemies back

zh_cn: 进入防御姿态并反刺攻击者
en_us: Brace up and retaliate with bristles

zh_cn: 齐射尖刺造成范围伤害
射出诅咒箭降低目标防御
